text_original: this is stupid app play 10 - 20 messages then wait 24 hours restart the messages again that's a waste of time I'm deleting this app
text_zh: 这个愚蠢的软件，玩10到20条消息就要等24小时才能重新开始，真是浪费时间，我要删了这软件。
reply_original: I'm truly sorry for the frustration. High-quality AI responses require significant server costs, which is why we have daily limits for free users. We are actively working on ways to offer more free messages in the future. Please share your feedback or questions with us at support@fantachat.ai so we can help you further.
reply_zh: 对于给您带来的困扰，我们深表歉意。高质量的 AI 回复需要高昂的服务器成本，这也是我们对免费用户设置每日限制的原因。我们正在积极努力，争取在未来提供更多免费消息。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的反馈或问题，以便我们为您提供进一步的帮助。
